mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.rubric_key AS rubricKey, v.stage, v.is_active AS isActive, v.created_at AS createdAt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT d.mode ORDER BY d.mode SEPARATOR ',') AS modesCsv FROM rubric_version v LEFT JOIN rubric_dimension d ON d.rubric_version_id = v.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND v.stage = #{stage} AND v.is_active = 10 AND d.mode = #{mode} GROUP BY v.id, v.rubric_key, v.stage, v.is_active, v.created_at ORDER BY v.created_at DESC, v.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) FROM rubric_version v LEFT JOIN rubric_dimension d ON d.rubric_version_id = v.id WHERE 1 = 1 AND v.stage = #{stage} AND v.is_active = 10 AND d.mode = #{mode}
SELECT id, rubric_version_id, mode, dimension_key, display_name, sort_order, created_at FROM rubric_dimension WHERE rubric_version_id = #{rubricVersionId} ORDER BY mode ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, rubric_version_id, mode, dimension_key, `level`, level_score, criteria, created_at FROM rubric_level WHERE rubric_version_id = #{rubricVersionId} ORDER BY mode ASC, dimension_key ASC, FIELD(`level`, 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E')
SELECT DISTINCT mode FROM rubric_dimension WHERE rubric_version_id = #{rubricVersionId} ORDER BY mode ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rubric_version (rubric_key, stage, is_active) VALUES (#{rubricKey}, #{stage}, #{isActive})
INSERT INTO rubric_dimension (rubric_version_id, mode, dimension_key, display_name, sort_order) VALUES (#{rubricVersionId}, #{mode}, #{dimensionKey}, #{displayName}, #{sortOrder})
INSERT INTO rubric_level (rubric_version_id, mode, dimension_key, `level`, level_score, criteria) VALUES (#{rubricVersionId}, #{mode}, #{dimensionKey}, #{level}, #{levelScore}, #{criteria})
mapper.update: UPDATE rubric_version SET is_active = 0 WHERE stage = #{stage}
UPDATE rubric_version SET is_active = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
